name: @aliran/repeater
description: Aliran repeater appliance — keyless regional super-peer that mirrors and serves encrypted channel feeds (ciphertext only)
comment: Deliberately NO hyperdrive and NO @aliran/core: the repeater never opens a drive (opening one takes an encryptionKey) and never touches crypto beyond topic hashing. It is a blind block mirror — everything it stores and serves is ciphertext.
